race.comment: TICKLE ME PINK (10) was ridden more aggressively last start when second-up from a spell and responded by going within a whisker of scoring over 1350m at the Beaumont track. Strips fitter and enjoys racing on this circuit. Looks the testing material. YOU'RE THE CHOICE (15) bolted in first-up at Gosford then was in the firing line all the way before finishing third over 1200m at Kembla last time out. New to this trip but it looks the right move at the third run back. VIA FLAMINIA (13) is a lightly raced filly back from a 24-week spell. Gets plenty of weight off some key rivals and is capable of a big run while fresh. STAR ACT (8)  returned at long odds last start and finished 3.5 lengths adrift in fourth over 1250m at Canterbury. Fitter and in the mix.
